<!--
Olympus arcs are HIGH-COMPOSITE by default — each one named, each one
its own Delphi note, each one sworn on Styx. Don't open this issue for
small fixes (those just go through the regular PR flow). Open it for
something that earns its own arc.
-->

## Proposed arc name + mythological anchor

<!-- e.g. "Apollo-Forge — extending Apollo's prophecy into a real
     forecasting framework." The mythology must justify the structural
     job. No decorative additions (AP8). -->

## The gap this closes

<!-- What does the substrate FAIL TO DO today that this would fix?
     Concrete examples. No vague "would be nice." -->

## What ships

<!-- Modules, errands, HTTP endpoints, Agora pages, tests. -->

## What does NOT ship

<!-- Explicit deferrals. Define the boundary. -->

## Constitution

<!-- Which invariants does this honor? Which does it touch?
     If it expands authority (Pan, Zeus, etc.), say so loudly. -->

## Risk class

LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH / COMPOSITE

## Estimated scope

- LOC: ~
- New tests: ~
- New deps: (default zero; justify any addition)
- Sessions to ship: 1 per arc per the Decade discipline
